creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
It will also not complain about 'pkgs.db' if it is seen and will not throw errors about missing origin lines for packages matching /^bsdpan-'/, both of which I forgot to note in the change log.

0.1.1	2009-03-25/13:00
		-Now handles display lines.

0.1.0	2009-03-01/13:00
		-Make processing file related things for the pakages optional.

How-To-Repeat: 

1: Watch it complain about @display lines.
2:
3: Install this and watch it be happy.
